text:
Once upon a time in lush Valley Meadows lived a curious bunny named Winnippy. Winnippy loved exploring. Each dawn, he trotted off into the dew-kissed woods. His favorite spots were old Oak Hollow, where the owls liked to whistle, and Whisper Creek, where the squirrels showed him secret acorn gardens.

One particular summer day, Winnippy noticed something unusual. Instead of ordinary clouds drifting overhead, there were birds! They were singing a catchy tune about owls and squirrels. Winnippy listened intently. They sang an ode to friendship. He felt honored.

So he began composing his own song. He whistle-sang about the moonlit nights he spent dreaming owl wishes came true. His own song soared high, so high that occasionally a owl would swoop down to listen.

News of Winnippy's beautiful singing spread across Valley Meadows. Birds flew even quieter. Beavers paused their building projects. Every creature wanted a chance at these incredible owl ears.

Winn
